title: Initial value of register ignored during synthesis

features.name: register with explicit initial value in synchronous always block
features.description: Code should include a register declared with an explicit initial value that is assigned inside a clocked always block, testing whether the synthesis tool preserves the initial value

features.name: signed input wire driving register assignment
features.description: Code should include a signed input wire that drives a register assignment in a synchronous block, testing signed-to-unsigned propagation across the register boundary
